success_definition.any_activity: Detectable conversion or substrate turnover under plausible conditions.

module2_active_site_refinement.selection_explain: Selected scaffold_lib_serine_hydrolase_v1_scaffold_015 with ranking score 2.87426. Predicted k_mean=3.91423 (CI90 0.11967-13.73743) using Eyring ranking. Retention penalty applied (MEDIUM retention risk).
module2_active_site_refinement.objective: Improve retention without breaking access or reach.

pocket_check.reason: PDB file not available in runtime.

variant_set.label: Oxyanion hole strengthening
variant_set.description: Increase donor strength near the carbonyl oxygen.
variant_set.rationale: Improve stabilization of the tetrahedral intermediate.
variant_set.strain_note: structural localization required; conservative strain floor applied
variant_set.objective: Improve retention without breaking access or reach.

assumptions: strain floor applied for structural localization

variant_set.label: Hydrophobic clamp
variant_set.description: Add aromatic/hydrophobic packing to stabilize the aromatic ring.
variant_set.rationale: Retention weakness; add hydrophobic wall for ring packing.
variant_set.strain_note: structural localization required; conservative strain floor applied
variant_set.objective: Improve retention without breaking access or reach.

assumptions: strain floor applied for structural localization

variant_set.label: Polar anchor (carboxylate)
variant_set.description: Introduce a positive anchor for the carboxylate.
variant_set.rationale: Carboxylate is negative at pH 6.5–8; add a cationic anchor.
variant_set.strain_note: structural localization required; conservative strain floor applied
variant_set.objective: Improve retention without breaking access or reach.

assumptions: strain floor applied for structural localization
